![](https://uavionix.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/ZPX1_productheader3_1x1-300x300.png)

[Learn More](https://uavionix.com/defense/zpx-1/)
The RT-2087/ZPX-1 is a complete, low-SWaP Combat ID system designed to satisfy Identification Friend or Foe (IFF) Transponder and Automatic Dependent Surveillance – Broadcast (ADS-B) requirements for Uncrewed Aircraft Systems (UAS) operating both in battlefield and civilian controlled airspace.

items.name: ZPR Passive Receiver
items.product_type: Passive Mode 5 IFF and ADS-B receiver for situational awareness

evidence.snippet:
### ZPR Passive Receiver
[Learn More](https://uavionix.com/defense/zpr/)
The uAvionix ZPR is a passive Mode 5 L2/2-B IFF and civil 1090 MHz ADS-B receiver system that provides situational awareness of civil and military aircraft in national airspaces or on the battlefield. ZPR weighs 50 grams and is AIMS Certification Pending.

tagline: Manufactures airborne avionics and surveillance subsystems for general aviation, UAS, airports, and defense—primarily ADS-B transponders (ping200XR TSO), command-and-control datalinks (muLTElink915), and traffic-awareness displays. NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown; public evidence of defense applications limited to marketing mentions of "Micro IFF" without program attribution or technical detail.
